name: Developing Authentic Simulated Learners for Mathematics Teacher Learning: Insights from Three Approaches with Large Language Models
summary: AIED 2026 accepted preprint comparing fine-tuning, multi-agent, and DPO approaches against few-shot prompting for simulated fifth-grade mathematics learners, using cognitive and language authenticity coding plus interviews with preservice teachers and researchers.

access_attempts.notes: Used abstract, methods, results, and discussion sections for extraction.
